UPDATE ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs
					SET 
						TargetServer = @serverName,
						ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn	
					OUTPUT
						INSERTED.OrganizationId,
						INSERTED.OperationType,
						INSERTED.TargetServer
					WHERE 
						 OrganizationId = @orgId

UPDATE ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs 
							SET HostId = NULL, State = @readyState
							WHERE HostId = @hostId and State = @lockedState
Exception while trying to open database connection for organization {0}

SELECT TOP {0}
				Id, OrganizationId, TargetServer, OperationType as OpType, RecurrenceStartTime, RecurrencePattern, CapacityType = 2 {1}
			FROM 
				ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs j
			WHERE
				j.NextRunTime < @startCycleTime
				AND j.State=@readyState
				AND j.Enabled = 1
				{2}
				AND j.OrganizationId NOT IN
					(
						SELECT DISTINCT OrganizationId FROM ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs
						WHERE ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs.State = @lockedStat

DECLARE @priorityTable table
			(
				OperationType int not null,
				Priority int not null,
				CapacityType int not null
			)

			{0}

			DECLARE @invalidIds table
			(
				Id uniqueidentifier not null
			)
			
			INSERT INTO @invalidIds 
				SELECT Id FROM ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs  
				INNER JOIN @priorityTable q ON q.OperationType = ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs.OperationType
				WHERE CapacityType = @limitedServer 
				AND TargetServer IN
				(

UPDATE ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs SET 
							ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn, NextRunTime = @nextRunTime
								WHERE Id = @jobId

SELECT Count(*), MIN(NextRunTime) FROM ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs
										WHERE OperationType = 44
										AND NextRunTime < '9999-01-01 00:00:00.000'
										AND State = @readyState
										AND Enabled = 1
										GROUP BY OperationType

Declare @tableResult table 
(
	OrganizationId uniqueidentifier not null,
	OperationType int not null,
	OperationStartTime datetime not null,
	OperationEndTime datetime not null
)

Update ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs
Set 
	HostId = null, 
	State = @newState, 
	LastResultCode = @errorCode, 
	LastRunTime = @modifiedOn,	
	ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn,	
	NextRunTime = @nextRunTime
	{0} {1}
output
	INSERTED.OrganizationId,
	INSERTED.OperationType,
	DELETED.ModifiedOn,
	INSE

Declare @tableResult table 
(
	OrganizationId uniqueidentifier not null,
	OperationType int not null,
	OperationStartTime datetime not null,
	OperationEndTime datetime not null
)

Update ScaleGroupOrganizationMaintenanceJobs
Set 
	HostId = null, 
	State = @newState, 
	LastResultCode = @errorCode, 
	LastResultData = @resultData,
	LastRunTime = @modifiedOn,	
	ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn,	
	ExecutionTime = @executionTime,

	NextRunTime = @nextRunTime
	{0} {1}
output
	INSERTED.Or

UPDATE ActivityPointerBase
		SET
			DeliveryAttempts = COALESCE(DeliveryAttempts, 0) + 1, 
			DeliveryLastAttemptedOn = @dateTimeNow,
			PostponeActivityProcessingUntil = @sendingDelayAllowed
		OUTPUT
			INSERTED.ActivityId,
			INSERTED.ActivityTypeCode,
			INSERTED.Subject,
			INSERTED.Description,
			INSERTED.PriorityCode,
			INSERTED.EmailAttachmentCount,
			INSERTED.SenderMailboxId,
			INSERTED.DeliveryAttempts,
			INSERTED.ConversationIndex,
			INSERTED.MessageId,
			INSERTE

update MailboxBase WITH  (READPAST,READCOMMITTEDLOCK,UPDLOCK)
					set
						ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn
					where 
							ProcessingStateCode = @lockedState
							and HostId = @hostId

update MailboxBase  WITH  (READPAST,READCOMMITTEDLOCK,UPDLOCK)
									set
										ProcessingStateCode = @waitingState,
										HostId = NULL,
										ModifiedOn = @utcNow,
										PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil = @utcNow

SELECT MailboxId , ProcessingLastAttemptedOn, IsServiceAccount
												FROM MailboxBase WITH (NOLOCK) 
												WHERE
													ProcessingStateCode = @lockedState
													and HostId = @hostId

SELECT MailboxId , ProcessingLastAttemptedOn, PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil
						FROM MailboxBase WITH (NOLOCK) 
						WHERE
							ProcessingStateCode = @waitingState
							AND
							PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil <= @dateTime

SELECT MailboxId, LastSyncErrorCode, LastSyncErrorOccurredOn, LastSyncError, IncomingEmailDeliveryMethod, ACTDeliveryMethod, OutgoingEmailDeliveryMethod,
									EnabledForACT, EnabledForIncomingEmail, EnabledForOutgoingEmail, ACTStatus, IncomingEmailStatus, OutgoingEmailStatus, LastSuccessfulSyncCompletedOn
								FROM MailboxBase WITH (NOLOCK) 
								WHERE
									ProcessingStateCode = @lockedState
									OR
									PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil < @maxDateTime
								ORDER BY

UPDATE Mailboxbase WITH (READPAST, READCOMMITTEDLOCK, UPDLOCK)
				SET 
					HostId = @hostId,
					ModifiedOn = @dateTimeNow,
					ProcessingLastAttemptedOn = @dateTimeNow,

UPDATE Mailboxbase WITH (READPAST, READCOMMITTEDLOCK, UPDLOCK)
				SET 
					HostId = @hostId,
					ModifiedOn = @dateTimeNow,
					ProcessingLastAttemptedOn = @dateTimeNow,

ProcessingStateCode = @lockedState,
					PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil = @maxDateTime
				OUTPUT
					INSERTED.MailboxId,
					INSERTED.CreatedOn,
					INSERTED.ModifiedOn,
					INSERTED.ReceivingPostponedUntil,
					INSERTED.NoEmailCount,
					INSERTED.ProcessEmailReceivedAfter,
					INSERTED.IsForwardMailbox,
					INSERTED.EmailAddress,
					INSERTED.ProcessAndDeleteEmails,
					INSERTED.LastMessageId,
					INSERTED.TestEmailConfigurationScheduled,
					INSERTED.PostponeTestEmai

WHERE 
					MailboxId 
					IN 
					(SELECT 
						TOP (@mailboxesToSelect) MailboxId 
					FROM 
						MailboxBase WITH (READPAST, READCOMMITTEDLOCK, UPDLOCK) 
					WHERE
						( 
							ProcessingStateCode = @waitingState
							AND
							PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil <= @dateTimeNow
						)
					ORDER BY 
						PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil
					)

UPDATE Mailboxbase
					SET 
						HostId = NULL, ProcessingStateCode = @waitingState, PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil = @utcNow
				
					WHERE 
						HostId = @hostId

update MailboxBase WITH  (READPAST,READCOMMITTEDLOCK,UPDLOCK)
								set
									ModifiedOn = @modifiedOn
								where 
									HostId = @hostId and MailboxId = @mailboxId

UPDATE Mailboxbase
					SET 
						HostId = NULL, ProcessingStateCode = @waitingState, PostponeMailboxProcessingUntil = @utcNow
					WHERE 
						HostId = @hostId and MailboxId = @mailboxId
